title: Host-Side Minimal MCP Trio Operator Adoption And Relay-Reduction Execution
objective: Execute the Packet 037 first-slice operator surface from the Olares host posture by staging only the admitted minimal MCP trio workflow files onto the host mirror, running the bounded host-side verification there, and capturing exact cleanliness and runtime evidence without widening AI scope.
dependency_note: Packet 037 proved the first slice locally. Packet 038 is the next truthful follow-on only if the same bounded operator surface can be adopted and verified from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` on the Olares host.
required_inputs: Already-running admitted trio on host ports `8710`, `8711`, and `8712` or the ability to start them without widening scope
Only the Packet 037 first-slice files staged to the host mirror
execution_scope: Revalidate host mirror cleanliness before mutation.
Stage only the admitted first-slice files needed for host execution onto `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Run `bash tools/ai/run-minimal-mcp-trio.sh up/status/verify/down` with explicit Packet 038 identity from the host mirror.
Capture host runtime and cleanliness evidence before and after execution.
explicit_no_go_items: runtime or service widening beyond the admitted trio
force, reset, clean, or remote rewrite on the host mirror
success_criteria: The host mirror starts from a clean state on `/home/olares/code/apex`.
The host-side operator sequence exits successfully from the host mirror.
Any resulting host dirtiness is limited to the staged first-slice files and is recorded exactly.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 039 - Packet 035 Through Packet 038 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Reconciliation Gate
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 from the Olares host posture. Packet 038 proved that the first admitted MCP trio workflow can be adopted from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` over live mesh SSH, verified successfully against the already-running trio on ports `8710-8712`, preserved the old clone as observe-only, and left the host mirror with only the bounded staged first-slice files pending later publication and reconciliation.
next_action: Open `Olares Dev Residency 039 - Packet 035 Through Packet 038 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Reconciliation Gate` as the next bounded follow-on so the local Packet 035 through Packet 038 authority set can be published and the host mirror can return to clean parity without destructive reconciliation.
